sections.paragraph: pl. f., Psa 58:7, and with the letters transposed מְתַלְּעֹות Job 29:17 Pro 30:14 Joe 1:6, prop. biting ones, biters, poet. used for teeth, from the root לָתַע to bite; comp. መልታሕት፡ a jaw, pr. that with which any thing is bitten. It cannot be laid down that this word denotes any particular kind of teeth, as the maxillary, the canine, or the incisors.
